control_card.C: A single stdlib Python script writes rows JSON, rows CSV, summary JSON, Markdown, and manifest through an atomic output-directory swap.
control_card.F: Missing evidence: theorem-level control of Young amplitude remainders, Sprint152 leakage residual closure, simultaneous constants, and the standard BKM/Clay translation.
control_card.G: Promotion is permitted only when every required row is present and every row classification is absorbed/closed; otherwise constants, model validity, BKM, and Clay booleans must remain false.
control_card.L: Rows -> closed classifications -> simultaneous constants -> model validity -> BKM guard -> Clay guard.
control_card.O: Worker 4 owns only the Sprint153 source/dissipation balance emitter and outputs/ns_sprint153_source_dissipation_balance/ artifacts.
control_card.P: Use this ledger to isolate which Young remainders and leakage residuals must close before the route can promote any downstream theorem flag.
control_card.R: Emit JSON/CSV/manifest rows comparing localized vortex-stretching core source to half-coercive viscous dissipation and the Sprint152 bounded leakage residual, with Young-split accounting and fail-closed flags.
control_card.S: The deterministic sample absorbs gradient pieces but leaves amplitude and leakage residuals open; there is no Sprint152 source artifact in this checkout, so the residual is recorded as an interface obligation.
